Name: Trigger TeamCity Build
Description: Trigger a specific Team City build from an Octopus Deploy process.

Parameters.Name: BuildConfigurationId
Parameters.HelpText: The Id of the build configuration to trigger.

Parameters.Name: TeamCityUrl
Parameters.HelpText:
The URL of the Team City server.
E.g. `http://teamcity.example.com`.

Parameters.Name: TeamCityUsername
Parameters.HelpText: The username to use for accessing TeamCity.

Parameters.Name: TeamCityPassword
Parameters.HelpText: The password for the TeamCity user.
